'''nabala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nicad|nicad]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-b-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nicad|nicad]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nabala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:næbælæth|næbælæth]] || [[word:næbælæj|næbælæj]] || [[word:næbælæsh|næbælæsh]] || [[word:næbælæ|næbælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nababalath|nababalath]] || [[word:nababalaj|nababalaj]] || [[word:nababalash|nababalash]] || [[word:nababala|nababala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nabalath|nabalath]] || [[word:nabalaj|nabalaj]] || [[word:nabalash|nabalash]] || [[word:nabala|nabala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nabaflath|nabaflath]] || [[word:nabaflaj|nabaflaj]] || [[word:nabaflash|nabaflash]] || [[word:nabaflaf|nabaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nabalatha|nabalatha]] || [[word:nabalaja|nabalaja]] || [[word:nabalasha|nabalasha]] || [[word:nabalaka|nabalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nabalath|nabalath]] || [[word:nabalaj|nabalaj]] || [[word:nabalash|nabalash]] || [[word:nabala|nabala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nabalathal|nabalathal]] || [[word:nabalajal|nabalajal]] || [[word:nabalashal|nabalashal]] || [[word:nabalakal|nabalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nabalathatha|nabalathatha]] || [[word:nabalajaja|nabalajaja]] || [[word:nabalashasha|nabalashasha]] || [[word:nabalaka|nabalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nabalathan|nabalathan]] || [[word:nabalajan|nabalajan]] || [[word:nabalashan|nabalashan]] || [[word:nabalakan|nabalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nabalathaoro|nabalathaoro]] || [[word:nabalajaoro|nabalajaoro]] || [[word:nabalashaoro|nabalashaoro]] || [[word:nabalakaoro|nabalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
